_doc: Top institutions by NIRF category (NIRF India Rankings 2025, https://www.nirfindia.org/Rankings/2025/, fetched 2026-05-30/31). Used to (a) replace LLM-guessed colleges, (b) power the per-home-state panel, (c) anchor per-college fee display. Lists are extended (top ~35-50) so a student's home state usually has up to 5 in a field; genuinely sparse state+field combos still show fewer (never padded). `url`/`fee_total` are curated for prominent institutes only; deeper entries omit them and render without a link/fee. `fee_total` = [minLakh, maxLakh] indicative total-program tuition (govt→private), point-in-time guide, not a live quote — verify & refresh annually.
